content:
We are delighted to inform you that we are launching a "6 Months Certificate Course on Prison Reforms: Law, Policy and Practices" from August 01, 2026 to 31st January, 2027 having Saturday afternoon online classes. The course aims to share thoughts and ideas associated with Prison Reforms in India keeping in mind the various Judgments from the Apex Court, High Courts, Reports of High-Powered Committees and enactment of the New Criminal Laws. Distinguished Judges, Academicians, Senior Advocates and Members of the Law and Public Policy Fraternity will be a part of the Course as Speakers. 

This Course is open to Government Officials, Lawyers, Academicians, Researchers and Students of Law and Social Sciences, etc.

Last Date of Registration- July 26, 2026
